input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.3.1
            TITLE: an accumulator management system must monitor the accumulator(s) voltage ev.7.4 and

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.3.1: An Accumulator Management System must monitor the Accumulator(s) Voltage EV.7.4 and
EV.7.3.1 An Accumulator Management System must monitor the Accumulator(s) Voltage EV.7.4 and 
Temperature EV.7.5 when the:  
a. Tractive System is Active  EV.11.5 
b. Accumulator is connected to a Charger  EV.8.3

final_answer: rule EV.7.3.1: An Accumulator Management System must monitor the Accumulator(s) Voltage EV.7.4 and EV.7.3.1 An Accumulator Management System must monitor the Accumulator(s) Voltage EV.7.4 and Temperature EV.7.5 when the: a. Tractive System is Active EV.11.5 b. Accumulator is connected to a Charger EV.8.3
